audit_result.proof_trace: Storage contains data columns verified via RPC by_root (ByRootRequestDataColumnSidecarRequirements: 3 checks) mixed with gossip-validated columns (GossipDataColumnSidecarRequirements: 12 checks). RPC by_root handler serves from storage without re-validating gossip requirements, potentially serving columns for blocks that fail proposer signature, parent validity, or finality checks.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker provides data column via RPC with valid KZG/inclusion proofs but invalid proposer signature. Node saves to storage, later serves it to peers via by_root RPC, violating the invariant that served sidecars must pass full gossip validation.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-025.text: Sidecars must not be served for blocks failing gossip validation in by_root responses.
PROP-6a4369e9-inv-025.assertion: forall sidecar in resp: gossip_valid(sidecar.block) == true
